allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/riftbound/cards" -TimeoutSec 45 | Select-Object total, cachedAt, @{N='first3';E={$_.cards | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/riftbound/cards?q=jinx" -TimeoutSec 45 | Select-Object total, @{N='first2';E={$_.cards | Select-Object -First 2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3}})

PowerShell($result = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/riftbound/cards" -TimeoutSec 45; Write-Host "Total cards returned: $\($result.total\)"; Write-Host "Sets:"; $result.sets | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.id\) \($\($_.name\)\): max=$\($_.collectorNumberMax\)" }; Write-Host "Types:"; \($result.cards | Group-Object type | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object Name, Count | Format-Table | Out-String\).Trim\(\); Write-Host "Rarities:"; \($result.cards | Group-Object rarity | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object Name, Count | Format-Table | Out-String\).Trim\(\))

PowerShell($result = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/riftbound/cards?set=VEN" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host "VEN cards: $\($result.total\)"; $result.cards | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.code\) $\($_.name\) [$\($_.type\)] $\($_.rarity\)" })

PowerShell($result = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/riftbound/cards" -TimeoutSec 30; $venCards = $result.cards | Where-Object { $_.setId -eq "VEN" }; Write-Host "VEN count: $\($venCards.Count\)"; $venCards | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.code\) $\($_.name\) $\($_.type\)" }; Write-Host "All setIds:"; \($result.cards | Group-Object setId | Select-Object Name, Count | Format-Table | Out-String\).Trim\(\))
